ai_suggestion: With Philadelphia reaching a hot 31.5°C today, opt for a stylish and breathable outfit like a linen short-sleeve shirt paired with tailored cotton shorts or lightweight chinos. Since the day started at a cooler 19.6°C, you might want to carry a light denim jacket for the evening, but stick to airy, sweat-wicking fabrics for now. Essential accessories for today include sleek sunglasses, a dash of sunscreen, and a chic canvas tote to hold your essentials. Enjoy the pleasant 15 km/h breeze while completing your outdoor tasks, but remember to seek shade and stay hydrated during this afternoon peak heat.
